title: Agentic Workspace Operation Contracts Registry
description: Registry of operation contracts exposed by workspace commands or adapters.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary for this entry.

primitive_registry.description: Fixed primitive registry value required by this contract.

schema.description: Schema reference or schema metadata for this payload.

schema_version.description: Version of the shared mutation outcome result contract.

applicability.const: Every registered operation with effects.writes_repo_state=true must emit this result contract unless listed in explicit_exceptions.
applicability.description: IR-owned rule selecting the operations that must emit mutation outcome fields.

outcomes.description: Closed vocabulary for truthful mutation results.

fields.description: Required fields carried by every applicable mutation result.

typescript_unimplemented_apply.description: Required truthful result for generated TypeScript apply primitives without a native implementation.

runtime_bindings.description: Runtime bindings enforced by contract tooling for the effects-derived mutation inventory.

operation_id.description: Registered mutating operation granted the exception.

reason.description: Narrow reason the shared result contract cannot apply.

proof.description: Validation that bounds and enforces the exception.

explicit_exceptions.description: Narrow, tested exclusions from the effects-derived mutation inventory.

contains.const: Representative applied, noop, blocked, and failed behavior must pass for Python and TypeScript generated targets.

proof_requirements.description: Minimum cross-runtime evidence required before claiming the invariant.

mutation_outcome_contract.description: Authoritative shared result invariant and inventory rule for mutating operation IR.

id.description: Stable identifier used to reference this record.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

command.description: Command string or command name used by this contract.

migration_status.description: Maturity or migration state for this contract entry.

items.description: One entry in the operations list.

operations.description: Ordered operations entries used by this contract.
